seoTitle: Lochiel vs Lockhart — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Lochiel and Lockhart. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Lochiel and Lockhart.
heading: Lochiel vs Lockhart — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Lochiel, New South Wales and Lockhart, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Lockhart has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Lochiel (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Lochiel or Lockhart safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Lochiel has a flood risk score of 42/100, while Lockhart scores 23/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Lochiel scores 40/100 for bushfire risk. Lockhart scores 24/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Lochiel or Lockhart?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Lockhart has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.93% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
